name: codex-bare
description: Thin web UI and TypeScript client for Codex app-server.

scripts.build: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router build && bun run --filter @workspace/ui build && bun run --filter codex-app-cli build && bun run --filter codex-discord-bridge build && bun run --filter codex-flow-systemd-local build && bun run --filter codex-flow-runner build && bun run --filter web build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router test && bun run --filter codex-flow-systemd-local test && bun run --filter codex-flow-runner test && bun run --filter codex-app-cli test && bun run --filter codex-discord-bridge test
scripts.release:check: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows release:check && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime release:check && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex release:check
